homepage.heroSubline: Powered Up Electric Inc. delivers reliable electrical services across Omaha. From routine repairs to complex installations, we've got you covered.
homepage.aboutTitle: Powering Omaha, One Circuit at a Time
aboutText: Powered Up Electric Inc. was founded in 2012 with a simple mission: to provide Omaha with dependable and fairly priced electrical services. We started small, wiring homes in Dundee and Aksarben, and quickly built a reputation for quality work and honest communication.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our team emphasizes clear communication, meticulous workmanship, and a commitment to safety on every project. We treat every home and business as if it were our own, ensuring reliable and lasting electrical solutions.

As a locally owned and operated business, we're deeply invested in the Omaha community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients. Our success is tied to the success of our neighbors, and we're proud to contribute to a brighter, more powered-up Omaha.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our team consists of licensed and highly skilled electricians with years of experience in the Omaha area.

valueProps.title: Reliable Service
valueProps.description: We show up on time, prepared to get the job done right. Count on us for dependable electrical solutions.

valueProps.title: Upfront Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear and transparent pricing with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what to expect before we start any work.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: We prioritize safety in every project, adhering to the highest industry standards and local codes.

homepage.ctaSubline: Call Powered Up Electric Inc. today for a free consultation and experience the difference.

services.name: Electrical Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable electrical repairs for your Omaha home or business.
services.description:
From flickering lights to sparking outlets, electrical problems can be frustrating and dangerous. Powered Up Electric Inc. provides comprehensive electrical repair services throughout Omaha. We quickly diagnose the issue and provide efficient, lasting solutions. Our experienced electricians are equipped to handle any repair, big or small, ensuring the safety and functionality of your electrical system.

We understand the urgency of electrical problems, especially with Omaha's severe weather patterns, which can cause power surges and outages. That's why we offer prompt and reliable service, getting your electrical system back up and running as quickly as possible. Whether you're experiencing a minor inconvenience or a major electrical emergency, our team is ready to respond.

Our repair services include troubleshooting, wiring repairs, outlet and switch replacements, circuit breaker repairs, and more. We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the durability and safety of our repairs. Don't let electrical issues disrupt your life – contact Powered Up Electric Inc. for expert repair services you can trust.
process: Step 1: Contact us to describe the electrical issue you're experiencing.
Step 2: We'll schedule a convenient appointment time for an electrician to assess the problem.
Step 3: Our electrician will diagnose the issue and provide a clear explanation of the necessary repairs.
Step 4: Upon your approval, we'll complete the repairs efficiently and safely, ensuring your satisfaction.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
faq.answer: We prioritize emergency calls and strive to respond as quickly as possible, often within the hour, depending on our current workload and your location in the Omaha metro area.

faq.question: Are your electricians licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured, providing you with peace of mind and protection.

faq.question: What types of electrical repairs do you handle?
faq.answer: We handle a wide range of electrical repairs, including wiring problems, outlet and switch issues, circuit breaker malfunctions, lighting repairs, and more.

services.name: Electrical Installation Services
services.shortDescription: Expert electrical installations for new construction and remodeling projects in Omaha.
services.description:
Planning a new construction project or remodeling your Omaha home? Powered Up Electric Inc. provides comprehensive electrical installation services to meet your needs. From wiring new homes to upgrading electrical panels, we have the expertise and experience to handle any installation project.

We understand the importance of proper electrical planning and installation, especially in Omaha's diverse housing stock. Whether you're building a modern home in a new development or renovating a historic property in Dundee, we ensure your electrical system meets all codes and regulations. Our team works closely with homeowners, builders, and contractors to deliver customized solutions that fit your specific requirements.

Our installation services include wiring, lighting installation, outlet and switch installation, electrical panel upgrades, and more. We use quality materials and follow industry best practices to ensure the safety and reliability of your electrical system. Trust Powered Up Electric Inc. for expert electrical installations that power your home or business for years to come.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your electrical installation needs and project details.
Step 2: We'll provide a detailed proposal with transparent pricing and a timeline for completion.
Step 3: Our experienced electricians will perform the installation according to industry best practices and local codes.
Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure the safety and functionality of the installation.

faq.question: Do you handle electrical installations for new construction projects?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience with electrical installations for new construction projects in Omaha. We work closely with builders and contractors to ensure seamless integration of the electrical system.

faq.question: Can you upgrade my electrical panel to accommodate increased power demands?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We can assess your current electrical panel and recommend an upgrade if necessary to meet your power needs.

faq.question: What types of lighting installations do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of lighting installation services, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, landscape lighting, and more.

services.name: Lighting Design & Installation
services.shortDescription: Enhance your Omaha property with custom lighting solutions.
services.description:
Transform your home or business with expertly designed and installed lighting. Powered Up Electric Inc. offers comprehensive lighting services in Omaha, from design consultation to complete installation. We understand how lighting can impact ambiance, functionality, and energy efficiency.

Whether you're looking to brighten up your living space, create a welcoming atmosphere for your business, or enhance your home's curb appeal, we can help. We offer a wide range of lighting options, including recessed lighting, pendant lighting, track lighting, landscape lighting, and more. Our team stays up-to-date on the latest lighting trends and technologies, ensuring you get the best possible solutions.

We also specialize in energy-efficient lighting solutions, such as LED lighting, which can save you money on your energy bills and reduce your carbon footprint. Our lighting experts can assess your current lighting setup and recommend energy-saving upgrades. Let Powered Up Electric Inc. illuminate your world with beautiful and efficient lighting solutions.
process: Step 1: Schedule a consultation to discuss your lighting goals and preferences.
Step 2: We'll create a custom lighting design plan that meets your needs and budget.
Step 3: Our skilled electricians will install the lighting according to the design plan.
Step 4: We'll conduct a final inspection to ensure the lighting is functioning properly and meets your expectations.

faq.question: Can you help me choose the right lighting for my home?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer expert lighting design consultations to help you select the perfect lighting fixtures and placement for your space.

faq.question: Do you install outdoor lighting?
faq.answer: Yes, we install a variety of outdoor lighting options, including landscape lighting, security lighting, and patio lighting.

faq.question: What are the benefits of LED lighting?
faq.answer: LED lighting is more energy-efficient, longer-lasting, and produces less heat than traditional lighting options.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades & Repairs
services.shortDescription: Ensure the safety and reliability of your electrical system with our panel services.
services.description:
Your electrical panel is the heart of your electrical system. Powered Up Electric Inc. offers comprehensive electrical panel services in Omaha, including upgrades, repairs, and replacements. We ensure your panel is functioning safely and efficiently, providing reliable power to your home or business.

If you're experiencing frequent circuit breaker trips, flickering lights, or other electrical problems, it may be a sign that your electrical panel needs an upgrade. Older panels may not be able to handle the increased power demands of modern appliances and electronics. Upgrading your panel can improve the safety and reliability of your electrical system and prevent potential hazards.

Our experienced electricians can assess your current electrical panel and recommend the best solution for your needs. We handle all types of panel services, from minor repairs to complete replacements. Trust Powered Up Electric Inc. to keep your electrical panel in top condition.
process: Step 1: Schedule an inspection to assess your electrical panel's condition and performance.
Step 2: We'll recommend the appropriate panel services, whether it's a repair, upgrade, or replacement.
Step 3: Our licensed electricians will perform the necessary work safely and efficiently.
Step 4: We'll conduct a thorough inspection to ensure the panel is functioning properly and meets safety standards.

faq.question: How do I know if my electrical panel needs an upgrade?
faq.answer: Signs that your panel may need an upgrade include frequent circuit breaker trips, flickering lights, and outdated panel design.

faq.question: Is it safe to attempt electrical panel repairs myself?
faq.answer: No. Electrical panel work is dangerous and should only be performed by a qualified electrician.

faq.question: How long does it take to upgrade an electrical panel?
faq.answer: The duration of an electrical panel upgrade depends on the complexity of the project, but it typically takes a few hours to a full day.

services.name: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive electrical solutions for Omaha businesses.
services.description:
Powered Up Electric Inc. provides a full suite of commercial electrical services to businesses throughout Omaha. We understand the unique electrical needs of commercial properties, from office buildings to retail spaces to industrial facilities. Our experienced electricians are equipped to handle any commercial electrical project, big or small.

We offer a wide range of services, including electrical installations, repairs, maintenance, and upgrades. We also specialize in energy-efficient solutions that can help your business save money on energy costs. Our team is committed to providing reliable and cost-effective electrical services that keep your business running smoothly.

From new construction wiring to lighting upgrades to emergency repairs, Powered Up Electric Inc. is your trusted partner for all your commercial electrical needs. We prioritize safety and efficiency in every project, ensuring the highest quality workmanship and customer satisfaction.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your commercial electrical needs and project requirements.
Step 2: We'll provide a detailed proposal with transparent pricing and a timeline for completion.
Step 3: Our experienced electricians will perform the work efficiently and safely, minimizing disruption to your business.
Step 4: We'll conduct a final inspection to ensure the electrical system is functioning properly and meets your expectations.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency electrical services for businesses?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency electrical services to businesses in Omaha. We understand that electrical problems can disrupt your operations, and we're ready to respond quickly.

faq.question: Can you help me reduce my business's energy costs?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer a variety of energy-efficient electrical solutions, such as LED lighting and energy management systems, that can help you save money on your energy bills.

faq.question: Do you handle electrical inspections for commercial properties?
faq.answer: Yes, we can perform comprehensive electrical inspections to ensure your commercial property is up to code and safe.

services.name: Generator Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your Omaha home powered during outages with our generator services.
services.description:
Omaha's unpredictable weather can lead to power outages, leaving your home or business in the dark. Powered Up Electric Inc. offers generator installation and repair services to ensure you have a reliable backup power source when you need it most.

We offer a wide range of generators to meet your specific needs, from portable generators to whole-house standby generators. Our experienced technicians can help you choose the right generator for your home or business and install it safely and efficiently. We also provide generator repair and maintenance services to keep your generator running smoothly for years to come.

Don't let power outages disrupt your life. Contact Powered Up Electric Inc. today to learn more about our generator services and how we can help you stay powered up during any situation.
process: Step 1: Schedule a consultation to assess your backup power needs and determine the right generator for your home or business.
Step 2: We'll provide a detailed proposal with transparent pricing and a timeline for installation.
Step 3: Our licensed technicians will install the generator according to manufacturer specifications and local codes.
Step 4: We'll provide ongoing maintenance and repair services to keep your generator in top condition.

faq.question: What size generator do I need for my home?
faq.answer: The size of generator you need depends on your power requirements. We can assess your needs and recommend the appropriate generator size.

faq.question: How often should I have my generator serviced?
faq.answer: We recommend having your generator serviced annually to ensure it's running properly.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to install a generator?
faq.answer: Yes, in most cases you will need a permit to install a generator. We can help you obtain the necessary permits.

serviceAreas.content:
Powered Up Electric Inc. is proud to provide comprehensive electrical services to the residents and businesses of Omaha, Nebraska. From routine maintenance and repairs to complex installations and upgrades, our team of licensed and experienced electricians is dedicated to ensuring the safety and efficiency of your electrical systems. We understand the unique needs of Omaha properties, whether you own a historic home in Dundee or a modern office building downtown.

We are committed to providing prompt, reliable, and affordable electrical solutions tailored to your specific requirements. Our services include everything from troubleshooting electrical issues and replacing outdated wiring to installing energy-efficient lighting and surge protection systems. We prioritize customer satisfaction and strive to exceed your expectations with every project we undertake. Trust Powered Up Electric Inc. for all your electrical needs in Omaha.

We're familiar with all the local codes and regulations in Omaha, ensuring that our work is always up to standard.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Powered Up Electric was fantastic! Our old electrical panel was outdated and causing problems. They upgraded it quickly and efficiently, and the price was very reasonable. We feel much safer now, especially with Omaha's summer storms.

reviews.name: David B.
reviews.text: We had Powered Up Electric install new recessed lighting in our kitchen. The electrician was professional and did a great job. There was a small issue with one of the lights, but they came back promptly to fix it. Overall, very satisfied.

reviews.name: Jennifer K.
reviews.text: Our power went out during a blizzard, and Powered Up Electric was the only company that answered the phone! They arrived quickly and fixed the problem in no time. We were so grateful for their prompt and reliable service.

reviews.name: Robert L.
reviews.text: Powered Up Electric handles all of the electrical work for our business. They are always responsive, professional, and do excellent work. I highly recommend them to any business in the Omaha area.

reviews.name: Emily S.
reviews.text: We had Powered Up Electric install a whole-house generator, and it's been a lifesaver! We haven't had to worry about power outages since. The installation was smooth and professional, and they explained everything clearly.

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: I had several outlets that weren't working, and Powered Up Electric fixed them quickly and affordably. The electrician was friendly and knowledgeable. I would definitely use them again.
